topics.topic_en: Financial Measurements for Economic Feasibility (NPV, ROI, Break-even)
topics.topic_ar: المقاييس المالية للجدوى الاقتصادية (القيمة الحالية، العائد على الاستثمار، نقطة التعادل)
topics.query_en: Economic feasibility NPV ROI break even analysis systems analysis
topics.query_ar: شرح الجدوى الاقتصادية NPV ROI تحليل النظم
topics.reason: CS students often struggle with the financial mathematics, such as calculating Net Present Value (NPV) and Return on Investment (ROI), because it requires accounting logic rather than programming logic.

topics.topic_en: Technical Feasibility and Risk Assessment Matrix
topics.query_en: Technical feasibility and risk assessment systems analysis and design
topics.query_ar: الجدوى الفنية وتقييم المخاطر تحليل وتصميم النظم
topics.reason: Quantifying abstract technical risks and understanding hardware/software capability constraints requires practical industry experience that students usually lack.

topics.topic_en: Baseline Project Plan (BPP) and Project Scope Statement (PSS) Structure
topics.topic_ar: هيكلة خطة المشروع الأساسية (BPP) وبيان نطاق المشروع (PSS)
topics.query_en: Baseline Project Plan BPP vs Project Scope Statement PSS
topics.query_ar: شرح Baseline Project Plan و Project Scope Statement تحليل نظم
topics.reason: Differentiating between the specific structural components, objectives, and documentation requirements of the BPP versus the PSS is highly abstract and tedious to memorize.

topics.query_en: Project Initiation and Planning systems analysis and design
topics.query_ar: مرحلة بدء وتخطيط المشروع تحليل وتصميم النظم
topics.reason: Grasping the exact sequence of activities, deliverables, and resource allocation in the PIP phase is overwhelming due to the sheer volume of project management concepts.

topics.topic_en: Structured Walk-through Roles and Peer Review Process
topics.query_en: Structured walkthrough systems analysis design roles
topics.reason: Memorizing the distinct roles (coordinator, presenter, user, secretary, standard-bearer) and the formal peer-review procedures can be confusing without participating in a real-world software team.
